Example Series Title

LitRPG / Progression Fantasy · In Progress

A quick, one-sentence hook about the vibe of the series.

For fans of: For fans of [Popular Book 1] and [Popular Book 2].

A longer description of the series goes here. This is a great place to put the overarching plot description that spans across all the books.

You can use multiple paragraphs, just make sure to keep the indentation aligned!

Length X books planned
Release Cadence Targeting ~X months between releases
Status In Progress
Book 1

Book One Title

Ebook January 1, 202X Released

Your book 1 blurb goes here. Make it punchy.

Vibes A funny, one-sentence bad summary of the book.
COVER COMING SOON
Book 2

Book Two Title

Ebook Q4 202X Editing

Blurb coming soon…

Vibes Another funny bad summary.
